'''âd-l-v''' ('''kadalav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:imborder|imborder]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-l-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:imborder|imborder]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-l-v
|-
! Lemma
| kadalav
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidalav|thidalav]] || [[word:jidalav|jidalav]] || [[word:shidalav|shidalav]] || [[word:kidalav|kidalav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudalav|thuthudalav]] || [[word:jujudalav|jujudalav]] || [[word:shushudalav|shushudalav]] || [[word:kukudalav|kukudalav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudalav|thudalav]] || [[word:judalav|judalav]] || [[word:shudalav|shudalav]] || [[word:kudalav|kudalav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudalav|thudalav]] || [[word:judalav|judalav]] || [[word:shudalav|shudalav]] || [[word:kudalav|kudalav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedalav|thedalav]] || [[word:jedalav|jedalav]] || [[word:shedalav|shedalav]] || [[word:kedalav|kedalav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodalav|thothodalav]] || [[word:jojodalav|jojodalav]] || [[word:shoshodalav|shoshodalav]] || [[word:kokodalav|kokodalav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodalav|thodalav]] || [[word:jodalav|jodalav]] || [[word:shodalav|shodalav]] || [[word:kodalav|kodalav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodalav|thodalav]] || [[word:jodalav|jodalav]] || [[word:shodalav|shodalav]] || [[word:kodalav|kodalav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdalav|thĂŠdalav]] || [[word:jĂŠdalav|jĂŠdalav]] || [[word:shĂŠdalav|shĂŠdalav]] || [[word:kĂŠdalav|kĂŠdalav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadalav|thathadalav]] || [[word:jajadalav|jajadalav]] || [[word:shashadalav|shashadalav]] || [[word:kakadalav|kakadalav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadalav|thadalav]] || [[word:jadalav|jadalav]] || [[word:shadalav|shadalav]] || [[word:kadalav|kadalav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadalav|thadalav]] || [[word:jadalav|jadalav]] || [[word:shadalav|shadalav]] || [[word:kadalav|kadalav]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadalav|shadalav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadalav|goshadalav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadalav|gokishadalav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadalavnĂŒ|shadalavnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadalavnknĂŒ|goshadalavnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadalavnĂŒ|gokishadalavnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadalavshĂ«|shadalavshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadalavnkshĂ«|goshadalavnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadalavshĂ«|gokishadalavshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadalavro|shadalavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadalavnkro|goshadalavnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadalavro|gokishadalavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadalavmu|shadalavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadalavnkmu|goshadalavnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadalavmu|gokishadalavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadalavsher|shadalavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadalavnksher|goshadalavnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadalavsher|gokishadalavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadalavng|shadalavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadalavnkng|goshadalavnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadalavng|gokishadalavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadalavya|shadalavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadalavnkya|goshadalavnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadalavya|gokishadalavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadalavyam|shadalavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadalavnkyam|goshadalavnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadalavyam|gokishadalavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadalavnĂŒshĂ«|shadalavnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadalavnknĂŒshĂ«|goshadalavnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadalavnĂŒshĂ«|gokishadalavnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadalavnĂŒro|shadalavnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadalavnknĂŒro|goshadalavnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadalavnĂŒro|gokishadalavnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadalavnĂŒmu|shadalavnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadalavnknĂŒmu|goshadalavnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadalavnĂŒmu|gokishadalavnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadalavshĂ«nĂŒ|shadalavshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadalavnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshadalavnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadalavshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishadalavshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadalavshĂ«ro|shadalavshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadalavnkshĂ«ro|goshadalavnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadalavshĂ«ro|gokishadalavshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadalavshĂ«mu|shadalavshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadalavnkshĂ«mu|goshadalavnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadalavshĂ«mu|gokishadalavshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadalavronĂŒ|shadalavronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadalavnkronĂŒ|goshadalavnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadalavronĂŒ|gokishadalavronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadalavroshĂ«|shadalavroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadalavnkroshĂ«|goshadalavnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadalavroshĂ«|gokishadalavroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadalavromu|shadalavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadalavnkromu|goshadalavnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadalavromu|gokishadalavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadalavmunĂŒ|shadalavmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadalavnkmunĂŒ|goshadalavnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadalavmunĂŒ|gokishadalavmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadalavmushĂ«|shadalavmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadalavnkmushĂ«|goshadalavnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadalavmushĂ«|gokishadalavmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadalavmuro|shadalavmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadalavnkmuro|goshadalavnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadalavmuro|gokishadalavmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
